title.formula: Brand + Product Line + Pet Food Flavor + Pet Food Condition + Pet Food Form + Dry Dog Food + Animal Lifestage + Nutrient Content Claims + Size + Container Type
rules: No standalone 'dog' or 'cat' — must use full 'Adult Dog Food' or 'Dry Dog Food' phrasing
Sizing must be lowercase — lb. and oz. not LB or OZ
Begin each bullet with a capital letter
Do not open with the word 'contains'
Paragraph form only — no bullet points
Repeat product name and keywords for SEO

general_rules.rule: Brand capitalised but NOT all caps — IAMS is the only exception
No domestic origin claims — no 'Made in USA', 'US Chicken', 'US Facilities', or equivalent including 'Domestically crafted'
Disclaimers must be integrated within copy — no asterisk (*) disclaimers
No ®, TM, (*), or similar special characters in any content field
